Aapta PRO

Better than

a Virtual Assistant Service

Get Started
With our Aapta PRO service, you can enjoy all the benefits of having a personal assistant/ Consultant/Professional without the overhead costs or commitment of hiring a full-time employee. Let us help you achieve more in less time and take your business to the next level.

Dharmendra Asimi

Founder of Aapta

We offer marketing & consulting services for businesses & Individuals

Introducing AAPTA Pro, your all-in-one virtual assistant service. Our experts can handle websites, social media handles, administrative tasks and freeing up your time for what matters most.

For Individuals

Individuals can benefit from AAPTA Pro by accessing a dedicated virtual assistant who can handle various tasks, including website handling, development, calendar management, email handling, digital marketing, and social media marketing. This service provides convenience, time savings, and professional expertise, allowing individuals to focus on their core priorities and achieve their personal and professional goals more efficiently.

For Businesses

Experience the advantages of AAPTA Pro, where businesses gain a versatile virtual assistant proficient in web design, development, digital marketing, and administrative tasks. Enhance productivity, reduce costs, and refocus on core functions while entrusting specialized responsibilities to our expert virtual assistant, ensuring efficient and professional support for your business.

Increased Productivity

Streamline tasks and maximize efficiency with our comprehensive virtual assistant service.

Flexibility

Scale resources to match your business needs, adapting to changing demands seamlessly.

Cost Savings

Access specialized skills without the expense of hiring a full-time employee.

Specialized Skills

Leverage our experts' capabilities for specialized tasks, ensuring professional results.

Get started now

the perfect solution for busy professionals who need to maximize their productivity and efficiency. Our highly skilled and experienced Professional can help you manage your administrative tasks, streamline your workflow, and free up your time to focus on your core business activities. From scheduling appointments & managing emails to conducting research and data entry, design your website or take care of your online IT, our Team Members help you stay organized and on top of your game.
